title: Better Spawn
description: simple client and server friendly mod to improve the spawn location and mechanics
body: # BetterSpawn *** **BetterSpawn** makes world spawn behave exactly how you set it. *** if you run it via client you will NEVER SPAWN ON A TREE AGAIN!! *** When a player has **no bed** (first join, bed destroyed, or bed invalid), they will spawn at the **exact XYZ coordinates** set by `/setworldspawn` — no safety checks, no moving up onto trees, leaves, or roofs. *** ## Features * Exact world spawn positioning (no vertical adjustment) * Works on first join and respawn after death * Beds and personal spawn points still work normally * Server-side only logic (no client install required, but if you want this logic to work for singleplayer uses i recommend adding it client!) *** ## Notes This mod intentionally disables vanilla “safe spawn” behavior. If you set world spawn inside a block, players may suffocate. *** [**![Promotional banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/PixelDreamStudios/SPEC_PixelDreamStudios_Promo.webp)**](https://www.bisecthosting.com/PixelDream)
